name: MongoDB Writer
summary: Writes the incoming payload to a MongoDB collection as an insert, update, or upsert operation.
description:
# MongoDB Writer

Persists the incoming payload to a MongoDB collection. Supports insert, update, and upsert operations. The `filter` expression identifies the document to update when using `update` or `upsert` mode.

## Use cases
- Persist processed results to a database
- Update records after transformation or enrichment
- Upsert to create-or-update records idempotently

## Notes
- `connectionId` references a saved connection from the runtime connection store
- For `update` and `upsert`, `filter` must be a valid JSON MongoDB query expression
- The full incoming payload is used as the document body or the `$set` value for updates

inputs.name: AnyPayload
inputs.description: The document to write. The full payload is used as the document body or update value.

connectionId.title: Connection
connectionId.description: ID of a saved MongoDB connection in the runtime connection store.

collection.title: Collection
collection.description: Name of the MongoDB collection to write to.

filter.title: Filter
filter.description: MongoDB query expression used to identify the document for update or upsert. Required when operation is 'update' or 'upsert'.
